footer.stayUpdated: Stay updated on the latest from {storeName}
hero.fallbackExcerpt: Handmade artificial trees and botanical masterpieces — each one of a kind. No watering, no sunlight, no care. Just enduring beauty for luxury spaces.
features.oneOfAKind.title: One of a Kind
features.oneOfAKind.description: Every piece is individually handcrafted — a unique 1/1 creation, never exactly replicated.
features.maintenanceFree.title: Maintenance-Free
features.maintenanceFree.description: No watering, no sun, no care. Hypoallergenic and free from pollen, mold, and allergens.
features.authenticMaterials.title: Authentic Materials
features.authenticMaterials.description: Real wood trunks, premium artificial foliage, and luxury designer pots for lasting sophistication.
features.luxurySpaces.title: Luxury Spaces
features.luxurySpaces.description: Designed for hotels, villas, boutiques, offices, and exclusive interiors worldwide.
about.locationNote: Based in Budapest, Hungary. We ship handcrafted pieces to Austria, Germany, and Hungary — with more European destinations available on request.
about.fallbackDescription: Handmade artificial botanical masterpieces for luxury interiors.
contact.fallbackExcerpt: We're here to help. Reach out with any questions about our botanical pieces, custom orders, or interior design collaborations.
contact.getInTouchText: At Infinytree, every piece is a unique creation. We invite you to contact us regarding inquiries about our available pieces, commissioned work, or how our handcrafted botanical designs can elevate your interior space.
contact.form.name: Name
contact.form.subject: Subject
contact.form.successText: Thank you for reaching out. We have received your message and will get back to you shortly.
contact.form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
cart.emptyText: You don't have anything in your cart. Let's change that, use the link below to start browsing our products.
cart.signInForBetter: Sign in for a better experience.
checkout.useSaved: Hi {name}, do you want to use one of your saved addresses?
checkout.sameAsBilling: Billing address same as shipping address
checkout.byClicking: By clicking the Place Order button, you confirm that you have read, understand and accept our
checkout.andAcknowledge: and acknowledge that you have read Infinytree's
checkout.howDelivery: How would you like your order delivered
checkout.billingSameAsDelivery: Billing and delivery address are the same.
account.signInPrompt: Sign in to access an enhanced shopping experience.
account.createProfile: Create your Infinytree Member profile, and get access to an enhanced shopping experience.
account.agreeTo: By creating an account, you agree to Infinytree's
account.noOrdersYet: You don't have any orders yet, let us change that :)
account.errorOccurred: An error occurred, please try again
account.passwordNotShown: The password is not shown for security reasons
account.customerServiceText: You can find frequently asked questions and answers on our customer service page.
account.profileDescription: View and update your profile information, including your name, email, and phone number. You can also update your billing address, or change your password.
account.ordersDescription: View your previous orders and their status. You can also create returns or exchanges for your orders if needed.
account.addressesDescription: View and update your shipping addresses, you can add as many as you like. Saving your addresses will make them available during checkout.
account.transferCantFind: Can't find the order you are looking for? Connect an order to your account.
order.confirmation: Your order has been placed and is being processed.
order.weHaveSent: We have sent the order confirmation details to {email}.
transfer.requestDescription: You've received a request to transfer ownership of your order ({id}). If you agree to this request, you can approve the transfer by clicking the button below.
transfer.acceptDescription: If you accept, the new owner will take over all responsibilities and permissions associated with this order.
transfer.notRecognize: If you do not recognize this request or wish to retain ownership, no further action is required.
transfer.acceptFail: There was an error accepting the transfer. Please try again.
transfer.declineFail: There was an error declining the transfer. Please try again.
transfer.transferredText: Order {id} has been successfully transferred to the new owner.
transfer.declinedText: Transfer of order {id} has been successfully declined.
onboarding.demoProductCreated: Your demo product was successfully created! 🎉
onboarding.continueSetupText: You can now continue setting up your store in the admin.
onboarding.testOrderCreated: Your test order was successfully created! 🎉
onboarding.completeSetupText: You can now complete setting up your store in the admin.
